lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi there.

lines.speaker: Jorral
lines.text: All is lost!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry?

lines.speaker: Jorral
lines.text: Don't bother, you're not experienced enough to help me!

lines.speaker: Jorral
lines.text: Just look around you! This great building will soon be in ruin.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Great building?

lines.speaker: Jorral
lines.text: Of course! This building has a history spanning generations!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ah, I see, a great history. But why will it be in ruin?

lines.speaker: Jorral
lines.text: It's to be ripped apart to make way for King Lathas' new alchemists' lab.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Does the king not respect the outpost's GREAT history?

lines.speaker: Jorral
lines.text: Well, actually nobody knows what the history is. But there must be something.

lines.speaker: Jorral
lines.text: Wait a minute. You could help me!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Me?

lines.speaker: Jorral
lines.text: Yes! Uncover the history of this building to convince King Lathas to leave it alone. Do you want to know more?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me more.

lines.speaker: Narration
lines.text: With many occupants over the years...

lines.speaker: Narration
lines.text: ...the building has seen much action.

lines.speaker: Narration
lines.text: It started life as an outpost...

lines.speaker: Narration
lines.text: ... its sole purpose being to see invading armies...

lines.speaker: Narration
lines.text: ... before they saw the city of Ardougne.

lines.speaker: Jorral
lines.text: If all goes well, I hope to be able to turn it into a museum as a monument to the area's history. What do you think?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: OK, I will make a stand for history!

lines.speaker: Jorral
lines.text: Oh thank you so much, you really are my saviour!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But where should I start?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do I need to do now?

lines.speaker: Jorral
lines.text: There are three people that may be able to help:

lines.speaker: Jorral
lines.text: There is a silver trader in East Ardougne called Erin, who I believe can help.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: In what way can he help?

lines.speaker: Jorral
lines.text: His Great Grandfather lived in this outpost according to the records. He must know something!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: OK, I'll see what he has to say.

lines.speaker: Jorral
lines.text: I've been told that there's a ghost far off in Port Phasmatys that moans of losing his life to this place.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sounds ominous. Does he have a name?

lines.speaker: Jorral
lines.text: He does indeed. It's Droalak.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll track him down.

lines.speaker: Jorral
lines.text: It might not be so simple! You'll need an amulet of ghostspeak to talk to him!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've conversed with the dead before, that shouldn't be too much of a problem.

lines.speaker: Jorral
lines.text: Up near the mountains, in Rellekka is a warrior called Dron whom I have spoken to in the past. He is always on the lookout for information that can improve his fighting and commanding skills.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: And how's he related to this outpost?

lines.speaker: Jorral
lines.text: He isn't directly, but he's studied many wars, and as this used to be an outpost it should have been involved in some war.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That sounds simple enough.

lines.speaker: Jorral
lines.text: He isn't the easiest person to talk to, so you may need to speak to his brother, Blanin, first.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's the story so far?

lines.speaker: Jorral
lines.text: What do you mean? You've discovered nothing!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Got to go, bye!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't care about some dusty building.

lines.speaker: Jorral
lines.text: It's doomed. DOOMED!

lines.speaker: Jorral
lines.text: Thanks for the help again. Feel free to browse the room next door!

sections.title: When player has not completed Making History

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there, I have this master clue he...

lines.speaker: Jorral
lines.text: Stop! I can't help you unless you help me out first.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay then, moving on...

sections.title: When player does not have a Strange Device in their inventory

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi Jorral, I have come to ask you to help with something.

lines.speaker: Jorral
lines.text: What can I do for you [Player name]?

lines.speaker: Jorral
lines.text: Ah! Remember that enchanted key you had to use previously?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, I do.

lines.speaker: Jorral
lines.text: Well this should function much the same, the deeper magic of the key itself is stored within this strange device.

lines.speaker: Jorral
lines.text: You should feel it, and it will guide you to where you need to go.

lines.speaker: Jorral
lines.text: You should make some room for it before I can give you it.

lines.speaker: Jorral
lines.text: Be careful with it, the raw magic can damage you unexpectedly when you feel it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I don't.

lines.speaker: Jorral
lines.text: Ah, well the enchanted key can lead you to treasure. The magical nature of the key heats it up or cools it down, depending on your proximity to the treasure.

lines.speaker: Jorral
lines.text: Well this should function much the same, the deeper magic of the key itself is stored within this strange device.

lines.speaker: Jorral
lines.text: You should feel it, and it will guide you to where you need to go.

lines.speaker: Jorral
lines.text: You should make some room for it before I can give you it.

lines.speaker: Jorral
lines.text: Be careful with it, the raw magic can damage you unexpectedly when you feel it.

sections.title: When player has a Strange device in their inventory

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey Jorral, I have one of those clue scrolls again, do you have any advice?

lines.speaker: Jorral
lines.text: That strange device will guide you in the same way the key did. Feel it, but be careful as it is very powerful. Good luck.
